meta_title: For Students: Git with AI to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Git with AI to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Checklist)
content.seo_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade projects.
content.answer_block: Transform your GitHub into a hiring engine by integrating AI-driven workflows. By leveraging Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you convert raw ideas into production-ready repositories. This checklist bridges the gap between academic theory and the professional craftsmanship required to land your first software engineering role.
content.intro:
The job market doesn't care about your GPA; it cares about the code you ship. Most students fall into the trap of building generic 'to-do' lists that gather digital dust in empty repositories. You are staring at a blank screen, burdened by the 'no portfolio' anxiety that plagues every aspiring engineer.

But the rules have changed. With the advent of autonomous coding agents like Antigravity and Claude Code, you are no longer just a coder—you are an architect. This guide forces you to stop writing tutorials and start building systems, leveraging AI to turn your Git history into a compelling narrative of professional growth and technical mastery.

steps.title: Architecting the Repository Structure
steps.description: Define a high-impact project scope that solves a real-world problem. Use AI to generate a professional directory structure that follows industry standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior Software Architect. Define a scalable folder structure for a full-stack SaaS application using TypeScript, Next.js, and Supabase. Include documentation and CI/CD configuration files.

steps.title: Iterative Feature Implementation
steps.description: Break down complex features into atomic commits. This ensures your Git history shows a logical progression of thought rather than a single 'initial commit' dump.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement an authentication module using NextAuth. Focus on clean code principles, modularity, and error handling. Provide a breakdown of steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Implement NextAuth with GitHub provider and secure API routes"

steps.title: Automated Documentation Generation
steps.description: A repository without a README is invisible. Automate the generation of technical documentation based on your codebase evolution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project directory and generate a professional README.md. Include a 'How to Run', 'Architecture Decisions', and 'Tech Stack' section.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Generate a professional README.md based on current file structure"

steps.title: Refining Commit Narratives
steps.description: Your commit messages are your legacy. Use AI to rewrite cryptic messages into structured, professional logs that explain the 'why' behind the 'what'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my last 5 commit messages. Rewrite them to follow Conventional Commits standards, ensuring they clearly communicate the impact on the codebase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Audit recent commits and rewrite messages for clarity and professional tone"

steps.title: Deployment and Portfolio Integration
steps.description: Finalize your build and deploy to a production environment. Connect your repository to Vercel or Railway to provide a live demo link in your portfolio.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment configuration file for Vercel, including environment variable suggestions and build optimization settings.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Prepare project for production deployment and generate environment template"

pro_tips: Always commit your AI-generated code in isolation to track the influence of the agent versus your manual oversight.
Use Git tags for project milestones to demonstrate your understanding of professional release cycles.
Never blindly accept AI code; force the agent to explain the performance complexity of the functions it creates.
Keep your main branch clean; utilize feature branches for every AI-assisted task to maintain a professional Git workflow.
Annotate your code with 'AI-Architected' comments to show future employers you understand the synergy between human oversight and AI speed.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, repeat this cycle with a focus on adding a complex feature—like a real-time WebSocket integration or a custom AI-agent backend—to demonstrate growth.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' project to appear. Your career starts the moment you push your first production-grade commit. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.

A repository without a README is invisible. Automate the generation of technical documentation based on your codebase evolution.
